ab: pa’usay misu tikay aw?
en: A:Can I interview you?

ab: aw, ya’asa ku lungan mu uziy.
en: B: Yes, I would love to.

ab: pa’usay misu tikay aw?
en: A:Can I interview you?

ab: laxiy, ungat sa’ayung ku ba’un mu.
en: B:Don't, I don't know much about it.

ab: kiyan hari su i babaw kinryaxan? muwa na musa kung macisan isu aw?
ch: A:你下午有空嗎?我想去拜訪你可以嗎?
en: A: Are you free this afternoon? I'd like to visit you, is that okay?

ab: awu, naw misu sali mu.
en: B: Okay, I'll wait for you at home.

ab: kiyan hari su sasan aw? muwan na musa kung maut isu sawun sinpung kayi na Gaga Atayan su ralali.
ch: A:你明天有空嗎?我想請問你關於泰雅族的傳說故事。
en: A: Are you free tomorrow? I'd like to ask you about the legendary story of the [Atayal] tribe.

ab: musa kuzing ragiyax sasan, ayat kung p’aki sali.
ch: B:明天我要去山上，不在家喔。
en: B: I'm going to the mountains tomorrow, so I won't be home.

ab: payux ku ba’un su yayuwaw Gaga na Atayan sarali , muwa na pa’usay misu tikay aw.
ch: A:我聽說您對泰雅族的傳統習俗非常了解，想要請教您一下。
en: A: I heard that you know a lot about the traditional customs of the Atayal, so I would like to ask you a few questions.

ab: ini kapayux ku bba’un mu ki, sikila talamaw mu su rangu samiyuk ku pana’ut su.
ch: B:我所了解的不多，但是我會盡量回答。
en: B: I don't know much about it, but I will try to answer as best I can.

ab: ma’ut kung ga musa balayi i galan su limu raywan aw? kusa na naki i balayi sabiur layla.
ch: A:請問我可以錄影嗎?這樣以後比較容易記錄。
en: A: Can I record the video? It will be easier to record in the future.

ab: aw, ungat ya’ih niya.
en: B: Okay, no problem.

ab: pa’usay misu tikay pisa ku kayan su la?
en: A: How old are you?

ab: rayma wayan su ma’isu pagan masapat kayan mu la.
en: B: I'm 98 years old.

ab: payang su la’i na ki.
en: A: You're so young.

ab: ini la ki’,rayma kung yutas la.
en: B: No, I'm not! I'm old.

ab: pa’usay misu tikay minkahun su inu?
en: A: Where are you from?

ab: nakahung kung ti gi alang Mabanan.
en: B: I'm from [the Eternal Peace tribe].

ab: pa’usay misu tikay Atayan uziy kanayrin su ga?
ch: A:請問您的太太也是泰雅族人嗎?
en: A: Is your wife also [Atayal]?

ab: ayat yu, hiya ga tayan alang na Puyuma.
en: B:No, she's a Puyuma.

ab: ba su kamayan kayi ni nanu?
en: A: What languages do you speak?

ab: ba kung kamayan kayi na Atayan sqliq ru kayi Atayan sa’uli.
ch: B: 我會說賽考利克泰雅語和澤敖利泰雅語。
en: B: I speak [Sykoriak Atayal] and [Zed Oli Atayal].

ab: pa’asunku riyax sawni ka ba kung macisan ki isu la, kayan cikay ku sawun na Gaga aliyap aw?
ch: A:今天很高興能訪問您，請您談一下，有關狩獵的禁忌好嗎?
en: A: It's a pleasure to interview you today, can you talk about the taboo of hunting?

ab: aw, mutu kung lawkah musa maliyap ragiyax saku la’li kung na.
ch: B:好的。我年輕的時候很常上山打獵。
en: B: Yes. I used to go hunting in the mountains when I was young.

ab: mahuway su la,tiku pinsaba su sawni ga balayi balay ki.
ch: A:謝謝，您今天所教導的真是太棒了。
en: A: Thank you, what you taught me today was really great.

ab: tiku wayan misu saba’ hani ga misi su sinbilan kayi na yayutas rarali’, ya’ani balay ku pinyuwan mu sawni.
ch: B:我所説的都是千真萬確的，祖先所流傳的講述。
en: B: All that I say is true, the sayings of my ancestors.

ab: tayhuk runi ku pana’ut misu la,mahuway la pin’azit su pasaba’ sawni la.
ch: A:今天的訪談就到這邊。非常謝謝您的分享。
en: A: That's all for today's interview. Thank you very much for sharing with us.

ab: ba’a la, patasala ta sa’utux lawziy ki .
en: B: You're welcome, let's talk again.

ab: mamawsa kung la ru, sa’utux riyax ga muwa na muwah kung minpung lawziy ka yayuwaw sarali lawziy ki.
ch: A:我要離開了，期待下次聽到更多的故事。
en: A: I'm going to leave now and look forward to hearing more stories next time.

ab: aw la! tahuway musa la.
en: B: Okay! Please take care.
